summary: Phase 12 admin panel coverage testing (8 ops gaps). Backend: 26/26 pytest cases passed for the new admin endpoints (P&L, reconciliation trigger + issues, locked accounts, unlock with audit log + 404, terms stats, terms pending users, ARCO events, refunds audit, stripe webhook events) plus auth-gate (10 endpoints reject without token) and regression on existing admin endpoints (stats, businesses/all, settlements). Frontend: admin login (TOTP), T&C grace-period modal dismissed via 'Mas tarde', new Cumplimiento tab and extended Finanzas tab both render correctly in Spanish with live data (Reconciliation found 2 real Stripe discrepancies, T&C version 2026-05-01 with 0/110 users + 0/54 businesses on current version, ARCO log empty, no console errors).

minor.issue: locked_until is stored/compared as ISO string. Works for the current writer (security_hardening also writes ISO strings) but it is fragile: any other future writer using a native datetime (BSON) would silently miss the {locked_until: {$gt: now_iso}} filter. Consider standardising to BSON datetimes or adding a runtime assertion.
Audit log target_id is the raw lockout key 'ip|email'. The email portion is PII. Acceptable for audit purposes, just flagging for ARCO/data-retention review.

Counts ALL businesses regardless of soft-delete or active status (no filter parallel to users). If/when business soft-delete lands, denominator will inflate. Mirror the {active!=False, account_deleted!=True} filter used for users.

Sum uses 'amount_mxn' but no schema reference is enforced (refund_events docs come from the webhook handler). If webhook ever stores cents under a different key the total silently becomes 0. Add a Pydantic model or unit test on the writer side.

issues: Spanish text uses 'Cumplimiento' (correct) but headings use 'Terminos' / 'Aceptacion' / 'Version' without accents. Bookvia is Spanish-first, recommend restoring accents (Términos, Aceptación, Versión, Año, Días, Día) to match brand voice and accessibility (screen readers).

action_items: (Optional) Filter businesses count in /admin/terms/stats by active/non-deleted once that flag exists.
(Optional) Restore Spanish accents on Cumplimiento tab strings (Términos, Aceptación, Versión, Año, Días).
(Optional) Standardise locked_until to BSON datetime everywhere or add a writer-side test.
critical_code_review_comments: admin.py 2518-2740: every new endpoint correctly gates on require_admin and excludes Mongo _id from output (admin_list_locked_accounts uses {attempts: 0} projection but doesn't strip _id; instead it manually projects to a dict with key/ip/email/last_attempt_at/locked_until — safe).
admin.py admin_unlock_account: idempotency-good (404 if delete_count==0), audit log written with SECURITY_UNLOCK + request context. Verified via DB read in test_unlock_removes_entry_and_audits.
admin.py admin_terms_stats: division-by-zero guarded by _pct(n,d). Returns is_hard_block_now flag to support UI gating after grace_period.

admin.py admin_arco_events: $in on action correctly groups Access (personal_data_export) and Cancellation (account_deleted_by_user); summary dict pre-initialised so missing actions still appear with 0.
admin.py admin_stripe_webhook_events: stripe_events uses event.id as _id; endpoint correctly maps _id -> event_id in payload (no ObjectId leak).
admin.py admin_reconciliation_issues / admin_list_refunds: both use {_id:0} projection — clean.

AdminDashboardPage.jsx: loadFinance/loadCompliance correctly grouped via Promise.all and gated by activeTab; has loading states (financeLoading/complianceLoading) and a Refresh button on Compliance — meets error-state guideline.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (login + T&C dismiss + both tabs render with live data)

test_credentials: Super Admin zamorachapa50@gmail.com / RainbowLol3133! + TOTP via /app/scripts/get_admin_totp.py. No new test users created.
seed_data_creation: TestSecurityLockouts seeds one TEST_F12B_-prefixed brute_force_attempts doc with 30-min lockout, then verifies it appears in /admin/security/locked-accounts and is removed by /admin/security/unlock (also asserts the audit_log row). Seed + audit row are deleted in fixture teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: test_fase12_admin_panel.py covers the 10 Phase-12 admin endpoints + 3 regression endpoints in ~4s once admin login isn't rate-limited. Login fixture re-uses the pyotp-from-DB pattern. Frontend test logged in via /bv-ctrl/login, dismissed T&C modal via [data-testid='terms-reaccept-later'], and validated both [data-testid='admin-tab-finance'] and [data-testid='admin-tab-compliance'] panels render real data (P&L cards, reconciliation issue list with 2 real Stripe entries, terms stats card, ARCO/refunds/webhook logs). No regressions in /admin/stats, /admin/businesses/all, /admin/settlements.
rca of the issue: N/A — no failing functionality. Issues listed under backend.minor and frontend.design are non-blocking polish items.
